title: Ace" Shaw
content:
I never saw any difference
        Between playing cards for money
        And selling real estate,
        Practicing law, banking, or anything else.
        For everything is chance.
        Nevertheless
        Seest thou a man diligent in business?
        He shall stand before Kings!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edgar Lee Masters, titled "Ace" Shaw", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
